name: io.github.globallayer/mcp-server
description: Merka2a MCP server - AI agents search, negotiate and order B2B wholesale products

environmentVariables.description: Optional Merka2a API key. If omitted, the server auto-registers a buyer agent on first run and caches the key in ~/.merka2a/credentials.json.
environmentVariables.name: MERKA2A_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Merka2a API base URL (defaults to the hosted Merka2a API).
environmentVariables.name: MERKA2A_API_URL
